rationale: Curated glossary entry: The Second Intellect — emanated together with the Third Intellect from the First, as one of the two Munba'ithin.

original_excerpt: عقول اور ان کے دوائر سے نیچے اترتے ہوئے عاشر تک پہنچا،  جس کو عالم طبعیت کا امر سونپ
annotation: Glossary term: عاشر (al-'Ashir) — The Tenth
rationale: Curated glossary entry: The Tenth (Intellect) — the Active Intellect, demiurge of the physical world in the standard Ismaili decuple-intellect scheme. Often paired with the epithets mudabbir (governor) and hakim (sage).

original_excerpt: متصل ہوتا ہے۔دنیا میں امام کے باب، ⟪ar:نفس کلیۃ⟫کے مقام پر ہیں کیونکہ وہاں ⟪ar:ھیکل⟫ بن
annotation: Glossary term: نفس کلیۃ (al-Nafs al-Kulliyya) — Universal Soul
rationale: Curated glossary entry: Universal Soul — the cosmic principle of life proceeding from Intellect, animating the sensible cosmos.

original_excerpt: متصل ہوتا ہے۔دنیا میں امام کے باب، ⟪ar:نفس کلیۃ⟫کے مقام پر ہیں کیونکہ وہاں ⟪ar:ھیکل⟫
annotation: Glossary term: نفس کل (al-Nafs al-Kull) — Universal Soul
rationale: Curated glossary entry: Variant of al-Nafs al-Kulliyya — Universal Soul.

annotation: Glossary term: نفس ناطقۃ (al-Nafs al-Natiqa) — Rational Soul
rationale: Curated glossary entry: Rational/Speaking Soul — the highest power of the human soul, capable of intellection.

original_excerpt: یعے سے اس مومن کی صورت ⟪ar:(نفس ناطقۃ + نفس حسیۃ)⟫اس کے جسم سے الگ ہو کر عمود نور میں جذ

rationale: Curated glossary entry: Sensitive Soul — the animal-soul power, responsible for sensation and voluntary motion.

rationale: Curated glossary entry: Pneumatic/spirit-like entities; those possessing the rihiyya quality.

annotation: Glossary term: صورت (Sura) — Form
rationale: Curated glossary entry: Form — the principle that actualizes hyle into a specific being (hylomorphism).

annotation: Glossary term: باب (Bab) — Gate

rationale: Curated glossary entry: Gate of Gates — the supreme Bab, head of the gate-rank.

annotation: Glossary term: حجت (Hujja) — Proof
rationale: Curated glossary entry: Hujja (Proof) — a rank in the Ismaili da'wa hierarchy below the Imam and Bab, bearing witness to the Imam.

annotation: Glossary term: ناطق (Natiq) — Speaker (prophet of a cycle)
rationale: Curated glossary entry: Natiq — Speaker; a law-giving prophet who opens a cosmic cycle. The Six Natiqs are Adam, Noah, Abraham, Moses, Jesus, Muhammad; the Seventh is the Qa'im.

annotation: Glossary term: امام (Imam) — Imam
rationale: Curated glossary entry: Imam — the divinely-designated guide of the believers, central to Ismaili (and Shi'i) theology.

annotation: Glossary term: لا الہ الا اللہ (La ilaha illa Allah) — There is no god but Allah
